channel.title: Smart Habitat
channel.description: Fresh takes for smart-home tinkerers and privacy-minded automators.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: home assistant beginner guide
item.description: The persistent myths around home assistant beginner guide, stress-tested against what smart-home tinkerers and privacy-minded automators actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your sensors in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying sensors project for smart-home tinkerers — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/smarthome is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the lighting community this week.

item.title: The local control checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified local control purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of routines
item.description: The most common early stumbles in routines, and the cheap corrections that fix them for smart-home tinkerers and privacy-minded automators.

item.title: "local smart home no cloud" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about local smart home no cloud through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your lighting questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the lighting questions smart-home tinkerers and privacy-minded automators keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in local control with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest local control adjustments that smart-home tinkerers and privacy-minded automators report mattering most.
